description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical takeaway cup with a white plastic lid and a colorful, geometric design wrapping around its body. The main body of the cup features a warm palette of red, orange, and yellow hues, intersected by diagonal and rectangular shapes. On one side, the cup displays the phrase 'My Work Sparks My Passion' in a flowing white script, making it visually engaging and motivational. The lid is fitted and appears to be made of molded plastic, with a small raised section likely for sipping. The cup's surface is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of coated paper or plastic cups used for hot beverages. There are no visible handles, but the cup is designed to be held comfortably in one hand.
description: A tall, cylindrical takeaway cup with a white plastic lid and a vibrant geometric pattern, featuring motivational text in white script.
description_view_0: Front view showing the motivational text 'My Work Sparks My Passion' and the full geometric pattern.
description_view_1: Side view with partial text visible and a focus on the red and orange geometric shapes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the geometric pattern without any text, highlighting the color blocks.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the text and the transition between the red and orange areas.
